title: ROMANIA enforcement action against Continental Automotive Products SRL (15,000)
summary: Insufficient technical and organisational measures to ensure information security The Romanian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 15,000 on Continental Automotive Products SRL. The controller failed to implement adequate technical and organisational measures, resulting in a cyber incident. Legal basis: Art. 5 (1) c), (2) GDPR, Art. 32 (1) b),...
